zh.Colton, Lichfield, Staffordshire, Englan: 英國英格蘭斯塔福爾可爾頓
zh.Burton upon Trent Holy Trinity, Derbyshi: 英國德比夏爾伯頓 武朋 特倫特 霍利 特利尼迪
zh.Drakelow, Derbyshire, England: 英國德比夏爾德拉可洛福
zh.Church Gresley, Derbyshire, England: 英國英格蘭德比夏爾邱奇 格萊斯利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomasine de Wasteneys於1345年出生在英國斯塔福爾可爾頓時，她的父親Thomas de Wasteneys24歲，母親Joan de Toly20歲。她於1364年與Nicholas de Gresley在英國英格蘭德比夏爾德拉可洛福結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1405年在英國英格蘭享年61歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭德比夏爾邱奇 格萊斯利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomasine de Wasteneys于1345年出生在英国斯塔福爾可爾頓时，她的父亲Thomas de Wasteneys24岁，母亲Joan de Toly20岁。她于1364年与Nicholas de Gresley在英国英格兰德比夏爾德拉可洛福结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1405年在英国英格兰享年61岁，埋葬在英国英格兰德比夏爾邱奇 格萊斯利。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Wasteneys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from the Norman French pronunciation of le Gâtinais (formerly Gastinois), a province occupying parts of the modern Seine-et-Marne and Loiret.

variants.name: Westney
meanings: Anglo-Saxon: Westan-ig, from westan, west, and ig, an island, meaning a Western island

nameMeanings.name: Thomasine
meanings: Hebrew: A twin; Thomasine is a female version.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomasine de Wasteneys was born in 1345, in Colton, Staffordshire, England, her father, Thomas de Wasteneys, was 24 and her mother, Joan de Toly, was 20. She married Nicholas de Gresley in 1364, in Drakelow, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died about 1405, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 61, and was buried in Church Gresley, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomasine de Wasteneys est née en 1345, à Colton, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas de Wasteneys, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Joan de Toly, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Nicholas de Gresley en 1364, à Drakelow, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1405, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterrée à Church Gresley, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomasine de Wasteneys 1345 in Colton, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas de Wasteneys 24 und ihre Mutter Joan de Toly 20. Sie hat 1364 in Drakelow, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom Nicholas de Gresley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1405 im Alter von 61 Jahren in England, United Kingdom und wurde in Church Gresley, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomasine de Wasteneys è nata il nel 1345 nel Colton, Staffordshire, England, sua padre, Thomas de Wasteneys, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Joan de Toly, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Nicholas de Gresley nel 1364, nel Drakelow, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1405, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolta a Church Gresley, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomasine de Wasteneysが1345年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアコルトンで生まれた時，父Thomas de Wasteneysは24歳，母Joan de Tolyは20歳であった。1364年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアドラケロウでNicholas de Gresleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1405年にイギリスイギリスで61歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアチャーチ グレスリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Burton upon Trent Holy Trinity, Derbyshi: 영국 더비실르 버턴 업 트렌트 홀이 트리니티
ko.lifeSummary: Thomasine de Wasteneys(이)가 1345년 영국 스태퍼드실르 콜턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas de Wasteneys(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan de Toly(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1364년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 드라켈로에서 Nicholas de Gresley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1405년 영국 잉글랜드에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 c후르치 그레슬리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomasine de Wasteneys nasceu em 1345, em Colton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas de Wasteneys, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Toly, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Nicholas de Gresley em 1364, em Drakelow, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1405, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 61 anos, e foi sepultada em Church Gresley, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Burton upon Trent Holy Trinity, Derbyshi: буртон упон трент холи тринити, дирбишир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomasine de Wasteneys родилась в 1345 г. в местности колтон, стаффордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas de Wasteneys было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Joan de Toly, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Nicholas de Gresley в 1364 г. в местности дрекелоу, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1405 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 61 год и была похоронена в местности чурч гресли, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomasine de Wasteneys nació en 1345, en Colton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas de Wasteneys, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Joan de Toly, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Nicholas de Gresley en 1364, en Drakelow, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1405, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultada en Church Gresley, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
